case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MARIA SUSANA ALVAREZ HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,058.53 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARIA SUSANA ALVAREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED: FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED NOV-26-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARIA SUSANA ALVAREZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2018 BY PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARIA SUSANA ALVAREZ HERNANDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, MARIA SUSANA ALVAREZ $1,028.56 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,143.56, LOAN PRINCIPAL (1600) LESS PAYMENTS PAYMENT ON PRINCIPAL (752)= 848.00; CHARGED INTEREST (356.71) @ 43.86% ADJUSTED TO 292.50, LESS 237.94 PAID = 54.56. LATE FEES 196 LESS 70 PAID =126. 848+54.56+126 =1028.56. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
